description: The Supreme Leader's Military Office (دفتر نظامی رهبری, Daftar-e Nezami-ye Rahbari), also referred to as the military section of the beit-e rahbari (Leader's Household), serves as [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei)'s direct military staff. It coordinates military directives from the Supreme Leader to the [General Staff of the Armed Forces](/orgs/general-staff-of-the-armed-forces), the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps), and [Artesh](/orgs/artesh), and functions as the principal interface between the Supreme Leader and operational military command. The office was headed by Brigadier General [Mohammad Shirazi](/people/mohammad-shirazi-military) at the time of his death, with [Akbar Ebrahimzadeh](/people/akbar-ebrahimzadeh) as deputy. Both were killed in the [February 28, 2026 decapitation strikes](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-feb-2026), effectively destroying the Supreme Leader's personal military command apparatus.

sources.title: Office of the Supreme Leader (Iran) — Wikipedia

editorial_notes: The beit-e rahbari military section. Headed by Shirazi (killed Feb 28 2026), deputy Ebrahimzadeh (killed Feb 28 2026).
